title: NetMusic: LoginNeed
description: This mod adds access to VIP songs for the Net Music mod.
body:
This mod adds login functionality to the Net Music mod, enabling the playback of VIP songs. It requires Cloth Config API.

Currently, the login feature is not fully automated and requires manually copying your Cookie. The steps are as follows:

1.  Install the Cookie-Editor browser extension.
2.  Open NetEase Cloud Music.
3.  Copy the Cookie as shown in the image:
    ![How to Copy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b6530c4da5489110761d5e757ebb6da27ce79a2.webp)
4.  Open the mod's configuration screen and paste the copied Header String into it.
